Mann-Whitney U vs rest of connected 13-gene set (n=10). n=3 per group -- exact-test p is coarse-grained (min attainable p with n=3 vs n=10 is far from significance); effect size (median K 1.01 vs rest) reported as descriptive signal, not a hypothesis-test conclusion.
